entries.description: Google's official MCP server for Chrome DevTools: inspect pages, debug, profile performance, and automate the browser.

entries.name: Context7
entries.description: Up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples for any library, injected straight into context.

entries.description: Reference MCP server that fetches web pages and converts them to markdown for LLM consumption.

entries.description: Reference MCP server for secure, configurable file operations within allowed directories.

entries.description: Web scraping and crawling MCP server: extract clean content from any site, with search and batch crawls.

entries.name: GitHub

entries.name: Memory

entries.name: Notion
entries.description: Notion's official MCP server: search, read, and write pages and databases.

entries.description: Microsoft's official MCP server for browser automation: navigate, click, fill forms, and capture accessibility snapshots.

entries.description: Sentry's official remote MCP server: query issues, errors, and performance data.

entries.name: Sequential Thinking
entries.description: Reference MCP server for structured, revisable step-by-step reasoning chains.

entries.description: Reference MCP server for time and timezone conversions.
